Mean_thaw_cm: Average thaw depth for sample date
Standard_Devation_cm: Standard deviation of thaw depth for sample date
Standard_Error_cm: Standard Error of thaw depth for sample date
N: Number of measurements of thaw depth for sample date
Minimum_cm: Minimum individual thaw depth recorded for sample date
Maximum_cm: Maximum individual thaw depth recorded for sample date
CV_%: Coefficient of variation calculated for all thaw measurements on one date
